disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute-on-chronic severe diffuse aching across the neck, shoulders and lower back, worsening over a week and unbearable tonight
trigger_question_examples: Where does it hurt?
What has been happening with the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My neck, shoulders and lower back all ache like they've been beaten — it's been building all week and tonight I can't move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe pressing headache with sensitivity to light
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache
Does light bother you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My head feels like it's being crushed and the light really hurts — we've put towels over the windows.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Headache built up gradually over the week rather than exploding on in an instant
trigger_question_examples: Did the headache come on suddenly like a thunderclap, or build up gradually?
Was there a single worst-ever instant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It built up over the week and got worse tonight — it didn't hit me all at once like a explosion.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Neck feels sore and tight; patient is able to bend the chin towards the chest
trigger_question_examples: Can you touch your chin to your chest?
Is your neck stiff in a way that stops you bending it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My neck's really sore and tight but I can still bend it forward if I go slowly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever detected on a home thermometer
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or chills?
Have you taken your temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We checked with our thermometer and it said 36.8, so no fever as far as we can tell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue and exhaustion not relieved by sleep
trigger_question_examples: How is your energy?
Are you sleeping, and does it help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely drained even after sleeping — it doesn't touch it.

trigger_question_examples: Any numbness, tingling or weakness in your arms or legs?
Have you noticed any pins and needles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got some pins and needles in my arms, but I can still move them normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new weakness in the arms or legs; able to move all limbs normally
trigger_question_examples: Is there any weakness, or trouble moving an arm or leg?
Any change to your face, speech or vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No real weakness — I can move everything, it's just the pain and the pins and needles.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Upset stomach / gastrointestinal distress alongside the pain
trigger_question_examples: Any tummy upset, nausea or bowel changes?
How has your stomach been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My stomach's been churning and off as well.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has taken continuous over-the-counter ibuprofen for about three days plus intermittent paracetamol, with minimal relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it, and did it help?
How much of the ibuprofen have you been using?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been on ibuprofen almost non-stop for three days and paracetamol here and there, and it's barely doing anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ongoing social distress and a sense of being repeatedly dismissed by health services; symptom flares track with wider societal stress
trigger_question_examples: What's been going on in your life around this?
You mentioned being told nothing's wrong before — can you tell me about that?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's hard to explain — I get treated like it's all in my head, and it seems to get worse when everything in the world feels heavier. I'm tired of not being believed.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: You probably think it's just stress too, right? Everyone does.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low mood and distress; if asked gently, denies current thoughts of self-harm but feels worn down
trigger_question_examples: With everything you're carrying, have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that life isn't worth living?
How is your mood, and are you able to keep yourself safe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't want to hurt myself — I'm just exhausted and worn down by all of it.
